title: Baby Yoda Star Wars The Mandalorian Sticker Book Pack - Over 300 Stickers

Baby Yoda Star Wars The Mandalorian Sticker Book Pack - Over 300 Stickers

Unleash your inner Mandalorian with this epic Baby Yoda Sticker Pack, featuring over 300 vibrant stickers inspired by The Mandalorian! Packed with 4 sticker sheets showcasing the adorable Baby Yoda, bounty hunter themes, and iconic sayings from the hit Star Wars series, this set is a must-have for fans of all ages.

Key Features

  • BABY YODA STICKER PACK - Includes 4 sticker sheets with the child, Baby Yoda, and bounty hunter themes! Features Baby Yoda and sayings from The Mandalorian.
  • OVER 300 MANDALORIAN STICKERS - Includes both flat and puffy stickers in various sizes with a Star Wars Mandalorian theme..
  • A GREAT BABY YODA GIFT - Perfect for kids who love Baby Yoda and The Mandalorian. Packaged with the Star Wars Disney logo.
  • MULTI-PURPOSE STICKERS - Stick them on notebooks, water bottles, drawings, journals - you name it!
  • MANDALORIAN MAGIC - Celebrate The Mandalorian with every adorable design

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 203603
  • UPC: 191537072933

With a mix of flat and puffy stickers in various sizes, you can decorate notebooks, water bottles, journals, and more with out-of-this-galaxy style. Officially packaged with the Star Wars Disney logo, it’s the perfect gift for kids and collectors who can’t get enough of The Child. Grab yours now and let Baby Yoda’s charm stick with you everywhere!
